available(string).details: For authoritative check, query L1 receiver directly

claimName(string).details: msg.value must cover CCIP fee. Caller must wear the protocol hat.      Works for ALL roles: gardener, operator, owner, evaluator, funder, community.

claimNameSponsored(string).details: CCIP fee paid from contract's ETH balance. Recommended for passkey users      who don't hold ETH. Contract must be pre-funded by owner.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

registerGarden(string,address).details: msg.value must cover CCIP fee. Called by authorized caller (GardenToken).

releaseName().details: Garden names (NameType.Garden) are immutable and cannot be released.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

withdrawETH(address).details: Reserves totalPendingRefunds for failed refund claims.

available(string).notice: Check if slug is available on L2 cache

claimName(string).notice: Claim a personal *.greengoods.eth name (user-funded). Any protocol member.

claimNameSponsored(string).notice: Claim a personal *.greengoods.eth name (contract-funded). Any protocol member.

failedRefunds(address).notice: Tracks ETH from failed refunds, claimable via claimRefund()

getRegistrationFee(string,address,uint8).notice: Get the CCIP fee for a registration message

getReleaseFee(string).notice: Get the CCIP fee for a release message

registerGarden(string,address).notice: Register a garden name. Called by GardenToken during mintGarden().

releaseName().notice: Release current name (gardener names only, 30-day cooldown)

setProtocolHatId(uint256).notice: Update the protocol hat ID (e.g., after Hats tree restructuring)

totalPendingRefunds().notice: Total ETH reserved for pending refund claims

withdrawETH(address).notice: Withdraw stuck ETH (excess CCIP fees, etc.)
